---
date: 2026/06/18
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
---

# Outputs

## Presentations

### IAVS 2026

The IAVS 2026 presentation is available as an embedded RevealJS deck and as standalone files.

- [Open standalone HTML](/Documentation/Presentations/IAVS_2026/index.html)
- [Download PDF](/Documentation/Presentations/IAVS_2026/iavs_2026_presentation.pdf)
- [View Quarto source](https://github.com/OndrejMottl/BIODYNAMICS-vegetation-cooccurrence/blob/main/Documentation/Presentations/IAVS_2026/index.qmd)

<iframe
  src="/Documentation/Presentations/IAVS_2026/index.html"
  width="100%"
  height="650px"
  style="border:none;">
</iframe>
